name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state



Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> {idle, trying, critical}]
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = idle
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = trying]
                 \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = trying
                     /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # critical
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = critical]
                 \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ state[i] = critical
                     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = idle]
                 \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod K
                 /\ q' = Append(q, head)
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod K
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ q \in Seq(0..K-1)
         /\ head \in 0..K-1
         /\ tail \in 0..K-1
         /\ size \in 0..K

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>> ==

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_counts, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSets
    /\ retransmit_counts \in [chunk \in chunks |-> Int]
    /\ channel \in FiniteSets

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
    /\ sent_chunks = {}
    /\ retransmit_counts = [chunk \in chunks |-> 0]
    /\ channel = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks
    /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![chunk] = retransmit_counts[chunk] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, retransmit_counts>>

ReceiveChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ channel' = channel \setminus {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_counts>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
